title: Garden Route Dam level update
description: GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - The latest water...
bodyText:
Update
                            Video

GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - The latest water update, supplied by George Municipality on Tuesday 29 October:

- Dam level: 100%Compared to 86.77% on 22 October
- Compared to 86.77% on 22 October
- Rainfall: 123.5 mm (Measured rainfall figures from 22 - 29 October)Compared to 20.5mm on 22 October
- Compared to 20.5mm on 22 October


> For water-saving tips please visit here.


The cooperation of all users of municipal water is essential and is greatly appreciated.

The Garden Route Dam is overflowing this morning, Tuesday, 29 October 2024.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
